name: Kioku Completion — Storage, Sync, Search API, Integration Tests
objective: Implement the three missing Kioku deliverables (SQLite storage, vault sync, search endpoint) and add integration coverage so the full Kioku boundary is verified and shippable.
exit_criteria: SQLite storage layer can upsert, fetch, and delete KiokuIndexDocument records.
Sync pipeline pushes canonical read-model state into storage without leaking secrets.
A POST /api/kioku/search endpoint performs full-text search over SQLite and returns typed hits.
Integration tests exercise the storage → sync → search path end to end.
All 93+ existing tests continue to pass after each subtask.
